ddls:
CREATE TABLE "music_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each music video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the music video */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the music video was released */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director who created the video */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the music video content */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the music video in seconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Specific release date of the music video */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style associated with the music video */,
  "rating" REAL /* User rating of the music video */,
  "isExplicit" INTEGER /* Indicator if the content is explicit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_music_videos_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_music_videos_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or description of the director's work */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performers" (
  "performer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the performer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the performer in the music video */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the performer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the performer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the performer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_performers" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the music video */,
  "performer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performer featured in the music video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id", "performer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_genres" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the music video */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the music video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "ref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the music video the reference pertains to */,
  "link" TEXT /* External link for more information */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES music_videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_usage_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stats record */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the music video */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views recorded for the music video */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the music video */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date the music video was last accessed */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Composite score representing user engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_usage_stats_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES music_videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the video */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the video was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES music_videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video file */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the music video associated with the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the video file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the video file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video file was uploaded */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video file */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_files_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES music_videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)
